labels.name: pr-level:trivial
labels.description: Trivial PR: typo fixes, <10 lines, 1 file

labels.name: pr-level:beginner
labels.description: Beginner PR: <50 lines, <=3 files

labels.name: pr-level:intermediate
labels.description: Intermediate PR: <=300 lines, <=10 files

labels.name: pr-level:advanced
labels.description: Advanced PR: <=800 lines, <=25 files

labels.name: pr-level:major
labels.description: Major PR: >800 lines or >25 files - needs extra maintainer attention

labels.name: type:feature
labels.description: New feature or request

labels.name: type:bugfix
labels.description: Something isn't working

labels.name: type:docs
labels.description: Improvements or additions to documentation

labels.name: type:refactor
labels.description: Refactoring code style, file structure, or performance

labels.name: type:chore
labels.description: Routine tasks, maintenance, build tasks

labels.name: type:test
labels.description: Adding or updating tests

labels.name: type:ci
labels.description: GitHub Actions, Vercel, Netlify, Docker configuration

labels.name: type:style
labels.description: Changes that do not affect the meaning of the code

labels.name: type:performance
labels.description: Performance regression or improvement

labels.name: status:draft
labels.description: Work in progress; not ready for review

labels.name: status:needs-review
labels.description: Waiting for reviewer response

labels.name: status:changes-requested
labels.description: Reviewers requested changes to be made

labels.name: status:approved
labels.description: PR has been approved by reviewers

labels.name: status:ready-to-merge
labels.description: Approved, all checks passing, and mergeable

labels.name: status:merge-conflict
labels.description: PR has merge conflicts that must be resolved

labels.name: status:ci-failing
labels.description: PR build, lint, or tests are failing

labels.name: area:frontend
labels.description: Changes to frontend/UI/UX components and styles

labels.name: area:core
labels.description: Changes to core business logic, store, or services

labels.name: area:customization
labels.description: Changes to templates, assets, or global configuration

labels.name: area:docs
labels.description: Changes to documentation files

labels.name: area:ci-cd
labels.description: Changes to workflow configs or deployment setups

labels.name: area:tests
labels.description: Changes to test files

labels.name: first-time-contributor
labels.description: First time contributing to this repository

labels.name: returning-contributor
labels.description: Returned contributor with prior merged PRs

labels.name: level:beginner
labels.description: Good first issue, simple tasks

labels.name: level:intermediate
labels.description: Requires basic knowledge of React/Tailwind

labels.name: level:advanced
labels.description: Complex animation, state management, or performance tuning
